services.name: workspace-sandbox
services.description: Small managed HTTP server rooted at this repository so Mewl can exercise real lifecycle control without touching arbitrary host processes.

services.name: workspace-preview
services.description: Second managed HTTP server for trying grouped startup and quiet-mode behavior inside Mewl.

profiles.title: Boot workspace core
profiles.detail: Bring up the starter local sandbox services when the managed workspace boots.

profiles.title: Quiet mode
profiles.detail: Park the extra preview service when you only need the smallest local sandbox running.
